Passionate about building real things.

I'm a Computer Science & Engineering student at Lovely Professional University, Punjab — constantly bridging the gap between idea and execution. My strength lies in full‑stack development: polished frontends with React and efficient backends with Node.js and MySQL.

Beyond the classroom, I've shipped six projects, earned five certifications from global institutions, won technical competitions, and accumulated HackerRank badges — all driven by one goal: writing code that actually matters.

I'm actively seeking internships or roles where I can contribute meaningfully from day one, grow fast, and work on products used by real people.
